summary: Phase 3 Sprint 3 - Admin Dashboard testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend API /api/dashboard/admin-today returns valid JSON with alerts, operations, finance, pending_approvals, system_health, recent_actions. Admin users see the new Admin Dashboard at /app with all 6 blocks. Agency users see Agency Dashboard (backward compatibility verified). No 403 feature_not_enabled console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API /api/dashboard/admin-today correctly returns {ok, data, meta} envelope with all 6 required fields
DashboardRouter in coreRoutes.jsx correctly routes admin users to AdminDashboardPage and agency users to AgencyDashboardPage
resolvePersona() correctly identifies super_admin/admin roles as 'admin' persona
All 6 admin dashboard blocks have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Quick action buttons navigate to correct URLs (/app/reservations, /app/crm/customers, /app/admin/all-users, etc.)
No 403 feature_not_enabled errors in console - /reports/* calls successfully removed from DashboardPage.jsx
Admin greeting displays correctly with time-based greeting (Günaydın/İyi günler/İyi akşamlar)
System health block shows database status, user counts, and incident counts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Sprint 3 Admin Dashboard complete. DashboardRouter now routes: admin→AdminDashboardPage, agency→AgencyDashboardPage, fallback→DashboardPage. Admin dashboard shows 6 blocks: Kritik Uyarılar, Operasyon Özeti, Finansal Snapshot, Hızlı Erişim, Onay Bekleyenler, Sistem Sağlığı, Son Yönetim Aksiyonları. Legacy /app/admin/dashboard still accessible via 'Yönetici Dashboard' sidebar link.

features_verified.backend_api_admin_today: PASSED - GET /api/dashboard/admin-today returns valid JSON with alerts, operations, finance, pending_approvals, system_health, recent_actions
features_verified.backend_api_agency_today: PASSED - GET /api/dashboard/agency-today still returns valid JSON for agency users
features_verified.admin_login_dashboard: PASSED - admin@acenta.test sees new Admin Dashboard at /app
features_verified.admin_greeting: PASSED - data-testid='admin-greeting' present with time-based greeting
features_verified.agency_backward_compatibility: PASSED - agency1@demo.test sees Agency Dashboard at /app
features_verified.no_403_console_errors: PASSED - No 403 feature_not_enabled errors in console
features_verified.sidebar_genel_bakis: PASSED - 'Genel Bakış' link goes to /app and shows Admin Dashboard
